name: Tablet and Laptop Faux Leather Sleeve - heyday™ with Keiji Ishida
description:
Keep your device protected with the Tablet and Laptop Faux Leather Sleeve from heyday™, designed in collaboration with Keiji Ishida. Compatible with the Apple iPad Pro 12.9-inch (3rd generation, 2018) or tablets up to 13 inches, this faux leather case is designed with imaginative art for a perfect blend of fashion and function. Carry your tablet or laptop securely and easily with this practical and catchy sleeve.

About the artist: Keiji Ishida is an artist and a graphic designer, currently residing in Los Angeles, CA. He uses repeated characters and motifs that often find their way through various mediums. His process is design-oriented while revealing the imperfections and efforts of the handmade.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
